pages.notes: Index page mapping page numbers to places/trips. Entries 5, 6 not visible — possibly missing or on a previous page. Entries 35, 36, 38, 40, 47, 50, 51, 59, 62 not present (gaps in numbering). Entry 2: second place name difficult to read, possibly 'Ralnege' or 'Ralnage'. Entry 9: 'Lettringsett Hall' — could be 'Letheringsett Hall'. Entry 11: last word possibly 'Maddock' or 'Paddock'. Entry 19: partially obscured, 'Stirling' and 'St. Andrews' best readings. Entry 26: 'Llanthony Priory' — could be 'Llanthony Priory'. Entry 27: 'Skiprith Castle' possibly 'Skipwith' or similar. Entry 30: 'David & Sally's art gallons' likely 'art galleries'. Entry 39: third word unclear, possibly 'church' abbreviated. Entry 42: 'Jumiages' likely 'Jumieges'; 'Yainville' is a village near Jumieges. Entry 52 appears twice. Entry 58: multiple place names partially cut off at edge. Entry 61: 'Vendeauil' possibly 'Vendeuvre', 'Quartin' possibly 'Quarré-les-Tombes', 'Chaumard' possibly correct. Entry 63: 'Clony' possibly 'Cluny'. Entry 64: 'Heyriane' possibly 'Heyriès' or 'Heyrieux'. Entry 65: 'Pinyon Valley' possibly 'Pinyon' in France (Gorges du Verdon area?); 'Langtrines' unclear.

pages.notes: Continuation of the index from the left page. Entries 71, 72, 77, 80, 84, 89 not listed (gaps in numbering). Entry 67: 'Vaiserelle' — possibly 'Vaisserale' or 'Vaissière'. Entry 68: word after 'Cirque de Navacelles' looks like '(Evenos)' or similar annotation possibly a later addition. Entry 69: 'Bastid' possibly 'Bastide'. Entry 74: 'Villefranse-Sur-Saone' — likely 'Villefranche-sur-Saône'; 'St. Jean de Vaux' possibly 'St-Jean-de-Vaux'. Entry 75: 'Lumbres' is a town in Pas-de-Calais. Entry 76: 'Trimsley' possibly 'Trimpley' (as mentioned on left page). Entry 83: 'Nlanafan Fawr' likely 'Llanafan Fawr' (Wales); written in teal/green ink along with 'Malvern'. Entry 79: '2003' is underlined in teal/green ink — year marker for this entry. The index appears to end at entry 91 (Weimar).
